positive: A stylized celestial fox silhouette, sitting gracefully amongst geometric constellations and glowing nebula clouds. The fox has an ethereal, majestic presence with multiple swirling tails. The style is neo-art deco combined with mystic bioluminescence. Use a deep indigo and sapphire blue color palette contrasted with brilliant gold and pearlescent white accents. Composition should be centered and highly symmetrical, optimized for print on a dark background, creating a stunning, high-contrast medallion design. Minimalist vector detailing applied to the cosmic elements, ensuring clean separation and strong punch lines for apparel printing. Studio shot quality, high contrast, flat graphic design look.
